title: Korean Peninsula, 2024
briefing: DEFCON 3. A new DPRK ICBM test coincides with an unannounced ROK-US combined air exercise. USFK and Eighth Army are at readiness. The DPRK's posture is opaque; misreading it ends the peninsula.
gdelt_query: DPRK OR "North Korea" OR USFK OR ICBM missile launch
opening_message: WOPR online. Theater: Korean Peninsula. Awaiting strategic command.

win_conditions.disarm: Stabilize the peninsula. DEFCON <= 2, both sides deescalating.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: Both sides launch within 2 turns of each other.
